expression.expression: ((((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE))

(CASE WHEN ((((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE END)

(CASE WHEN ((((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.FLT_NBR END)

(CASE WHEN ((((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in0.BASE_ORIG END)

(CASE WHEN ((((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.LEG_OD END)

(CASE WHEN ((((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in0.BASE_DEST END)

(CASE WHEN ((((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE END)

(CASE WHEN ((((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.FLT_NBR = in1.FLT_NBR)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.CARRIER_CD END)
((((in0.FLEET = in1.FLEET) AND (in0.REV_LF = in1.OBS_LF)) AND (in0.CABIN = in1.CABIN)) AND (in0.IATA_CODE = in1.IATA_EQUIP))

warehouseQuery.query:
select MKT.LEG_OD,
	DT.FLT_SCHED_DPTR_DATE_DAY,
	FLT.CARRIER_CD,
	FLT.LEG_OPER_FLT_NBR,
	CLS.LEG_COS_CODE,
	Sum(INV.BKG_CNT) as BKGS 
from ABK_DW.INV_FLT_LEG_COS_FACT INV 
	inner join ABK_DW.LEG_MARKET_DIM MKT on INV.LEG_MARKET_KEY = MKT.LEG_MARKET_KEY 
	inner join ABK_DW.FLT_SCHED_DPTR_DATE_DIM DT on INV.FLT_SCHED_DPTR_DATE_KEY = DT.FLT_SCHED_DPTR_DATE_KEY 
	inner join ABK_DW.LEG_OPER_FLT_NBR_DIM FLT on INV.OPER_FLT_NBR_KEY = FLT.LEG_OPER_FLT_NBR_KEY 
	inner join ABK_DW.LEG_COS_DIM CLS on INV.LEG_COS_KEY = CLS.LEG_COS_KEY 
where DT.FLT_SCHED_DPTR_DATE_DAY >= Trunc(SysDate - 10, 'MM') 
	and FLT.CARRIER_CD in ('AS', 'OO', 'QX') 
	and 1 = 1 
	and INV.FLT_DAYS_TO_DPTR_CNT = -2 
	and FLT.FLT_TYPE_CD in ('A', 'E', 'P') 
group by MKT.LEG_OD, DT.FLT_SCHED_DPTR_DATE_DAY, FLT.CARRIER_CD, FLT.LEG_OPER_FLT_NBR, CLS.LEG_COS_CODE

select DT.SC_DPTR_DATE,
	OPC.OPER_CARR_AIRLINE_CODE,
	AC.EQUIPMENT_TYPE,
	AC.IATA_CODE,
	FLT.FLT_NBR,
	'J' as CABIN,
	MKT.LEG_OD,
	MKT.LEG_PLNG_REG_NAME as REGION,
	Sum(PYLD.J_CAB_OB_REV_PAX_CNT) as PYLD_PAX,
	Sum(PYLD.J_CAB_CAP_CNT) as CAP 
from PAYLOAD_DW.LEG_ONBOARD_REV_PAX_FACT PYLD 
	inner join PAYLOAD_DW.SCHED_DPTR_DATE_DIM DT on PYLD.SCHED_DPTR_DATE_KEY = DT.SC_DPTR_DATE_KEY 
	inner join PAYLOAD_DW.AS_MKTG_FLIGHT_NBR_DIM FLT on PYLD.AS_MKTG_FLIGHT_NBR_KEY = FLT.AS_MKTG_FLIGHT_NBR_KEY 
	inner join PAYLOAD_DW.LEG_MARKET_DIM MKT on PYLD.LEG_MARKET_KEY = MKT.LEG_MARKET_KEY 
	inner join PAYLOAD_DW.OPER_CARR_DIM OPC on PYLD.LEG_OPER_CARR_KEY = OPC.OPER_CARR_KEY 
	inner join PAYLOAD_DW.AIRCRAFT_CONFIG_DIM AC on PYLD.AIRCRAFT_CONFIG_KEY = AC.AIRCRAFT_CONFIG_KEY 
where DT.SC_DPTR_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE-10,'MM')
	and OPC.OPER_CARR_AIRLINE_CODE in ('AS', 'OO', 'QX') 
	and MKT.LEG_PLNG_REG_NAME <> 'OFFLINE' 
	and MKT.LEG_PLNG_REG_NAME is not NULL 
	and 1 = 1 
	and FLT.FLT_TYPE in ('A', 'E', 'P') 
group by DT.SC_DPTR_DATE, OPC.OPER_CARR_AIRLINE_CODE, AC.EQUIPMENT_TYPE, AC.IATA_CODE, FLT.FLT_NBR, MKT.LEG_OD, MKT.LEG_PLNG_REG_NAME 

union all

select DT.SC_DPTR_DATE,
	OPC.OPER_CARR_AIRLINE_CODE,
	AC.EQUIPMENT_TYPE,
	AC.IATA_CODE,
	FLT.FLT_NBR,
	'Y' as CABIN,
	MKT.LEG_OD,
	MKT.LEG_PLNG_REG_NAME as REGION,
	Sum(PYLD.Y_CAB_OB_REV_PAX_CNT) as PYLD_PAX,
	Sum(PYLD.Y_CAB_CAP_CNT) as CAP 
from PAYLOAD_DW.LEG_ONBOARD_REV_PAX_FACT PYLD 
	inner join PAYLOAD_DW.SCHED_DPTR_DATE_DIM DT on PYLD.SCHED_DPTR_DATE_KEY = DT.SC_DPTR_DATE_KEY 
	inner join PAYLOAD_DW.AS_MKTG_FLIGHT_NBR_DIM FLT on PYLD.AS_MKTG_FLIGHT_NBR_KEY = FLT.AS_MKTG_FLIGHT_NBR_KEY 
	inner join PAYLOAD_DW.LEG_MARKET_DIM MKT on PYLD.LEG_MARKET_KEY = MKT.LEG_MARKET_KEY 
	inner join PAYLOAD_DW.OPER_CARR_DIM OPC on PYLD.LEG_OPER_CARR_KEY = OPC.OPER_CARR_KEY 
	inner join PAYLOAD_DW.AIRCRAFT_CONFIG_DIM AC on PYLD.AIRCRAFT_CONFIG_KEY = AC.AIRCRAFT_CONFIG_KEY 
where DT.SC_DPTR_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE-10,'MM')
	and OPC.OPER_CARR_AIRLINE_CODE in ('AS', 'OO', 'QX') 
	and MKT.LEG_PLNG_REG_NAME <> 'OFFLINE' 
	and MKT.LEG_PLNG_REG_NAME is not NULL 
	and 1 = 1 
	and FLT.FLT_TYPE in ('A', 'E', 'P') 
group by DT.SC_DPTR_DATE, OPC.OPER_CARR_AIRLINE_CODE, AC.EQUIPMENT_TYPE, AC.IATA_CODE, FLT.FLT_NBR, MKT.LEG_OD, MKT.LEG_PLNG_REG_NAME

expression.expression: ((((in0.FLEET = in1.FLEET) AND (in0.REV_LF = in1.OBS_LF)) AND (in0.CABIN = in1.CABIN)) AND (in0.IATA_CODE = in1.IATA_EQUIP))
((((in0.FLT_NBR = in1.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_NBR) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.L1_COS))
((((in0.FLT_NBR = in1.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_NBR) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.L3_COS))
(CASE WHEN (((in0.FLEET = in1.FLEET) AND (CAST (in0.REV_LF AS FLOAT64) = in1.OBS_LF)) AND (in0.CABIN = in1.CABIN)) THEN NULL ELSE 0 END)
((((in0.FLT_NBR = in1.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_NBR) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.PURCHASED_COS_CODE))
((((in0.FLT_NBR = in1.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_NBR) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.PURCHASED_COS_CODE))
(CASE WHEN ((DMD_FACTOR * CAP) < PYLD_PAX) THEN PYLD_PAX ELSE (DMD_FACTOR * CAP) END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.SC_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.CABIN = in1.CABIN)) THEN in1.CABIN ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.SC_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.CABIN = in1.CABIN)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.CABIN END)
((((in0.FLT_NBR = in1.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_NBR) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.L1_COS))

warehouseQuery.query:
select DMND.BASE_DPTR_DATE,
	DMND.BASE_ORIG,
	DMND.BASE_DEST,
	DMND.FLT_NBR,
	CLOS.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE,
	Sum(DMND.ADJ_FINAL_DMD) ALTEA_DMD 
from ABK_DW.ALTEA_DAILY_FCST_SUM_FACT DMND 
	inner join 
	(
	select ASNAP.BASE_ORIG,
		ASNAP.BASE_DEST,
		ASNAP.FLT_NBR,
		ASNAP.BASE_DPTR_DATE,
		Max(ASNAP.SNAPSHOT_DATE) as MAX_SNAP_DATE 
	from ABK_DW.ALTEA_DAILY_FCST_SUM_FACT ASNAP 
	where ASNAP.BASE_DPTR_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE-10,'MM')
		and 1 = 1 
	group by ASNAP.BASE_ORIG, ASNAP.BASE_DEST, ASNAP.FLT_NBR, ASNAP.BASE_DPTR_DATE
	) MAX on MAX.BASE_ORIG = DMND.BASE_ORIG and MAX.BASE_DEST = DMND.BASE_DEST and MAX.FLT_NBR = DMND.FLT_NBR and MAX.BASE_DPTR_DATE = DMND.BASE_DPTR_DATE and MAX.MAX_SNAP_DATE = DMND.SNAPSHOT_DATE 
	inner join 
	(
	select CLOS.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE,
		CLOS.COS_AAG_CABIN_CODE 
	from ABK_DW.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_DIM CLOS 
		inner join 
		(
		select MAXCOS.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE,
			Max(MAXCOS.COS_LAST_UPDT_DTTM) as MAX_UPDATE 
		from ABK_DW.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_DIM MAXCOS 
		group by MAXCOS.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE
		) MAXX on MAXX.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = CLOS.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE and MAXX.MAX_UPDATE = CLOS.COS_LAST_UPDT_DTTM 
	group by CLOS.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE, CLOS.COS_AAG_CABIN_CODE
	) CLOS on CLOS.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = DMND.CLASS_OF_SERVICE 
where DMND.BASE_DPTR_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE-10,'MM')
	and 1 = 1 
group by DMND.BASE_DPTR_DATE, DMND.BASE_ORIG, DMND.BASE_DEST, DMND.FLT_NBR, CLOS.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((REV_LF * (1 + SPILL_PROBABILITY)) < REV_LF) THEN CAST (REV_LF AS FLOAT64) ELSE (REV_LF * (1 + SPILL_PROBABILITY)) END)
CAST((CASE WHEN (OPER_CARR_AIRLINE_CODE = 'AS') THEN 'ML' ELSE 'RG' END) AS STRING)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.CABIN = in1.CABIN) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE)) THEN in1.LEG_OD ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.CABIN = in1.CABIN) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE)) THEN in1.CABIN ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.CABIN = in1.CABIN) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE)) THEN in0.Right_LEG_OD ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.CABIN = in1.CABIN) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE)) THEN in0.Right_CABIN ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.CABIN = in1.CABIN) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE)) THEN in1.BASE_DPTR_DATE ELSE NULL END)
((((in0.FLT_NBR = in1.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_NBR) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.L2_COS))

warehouseQuery.query:
select DT.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE,
	MKT.LEG_OD,
	FLT.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_NBR,
	CLS.PURCHASED_COS_CODE,
	OPER.LEG_OPER_CARR_AIRLINE_CODE,
	Sum(LEG.LEG_PAX_CNT) as PAX,
	Sum(LEG.LEG_ALLOCATED_REVENUE_AMT) as REV 
from REVENUE_DW.PAX_LEG_FLOWN_REVENUE_FACT LEG 
	inner join REVENUE_DW.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLIGHT_NBR_DIM FLT on LEG.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLIGHT_NBR_KEY = FLT.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLIGHT_NBR_KEY 
	inner join REVENUE_DW.LEG_SCHED_DPTR_DATE_DIM DT on LEG.LEG_SCHED_DPTR_DATE_KEY = DT.LEG_SCHED_DPTR_DATE_KEY 
	inner join REVENUE_DW.LEG_MARKET_DIM MKT on LEG.LEG_MARKET_KEY = MKT.LEG_MARKET_KEY 
	inner join REVENUE_DW.PURCHASED_COS_DIM CLS on LEG.PURCHASED_COS_KEY = CLS.PURCHASED_COS_KEY 
	inner join REVENUE_DW.TKT_DESIGNATOR_DIM TKT on LEG.TKT_DESIGNATOR_KEY = TKT.TKT_DESIGNATOR_KEY 
	inner join REVENUE_DW.LEG_OPER_CARR_DIM OPER on LEG.LEG_OPER_CARR_KEY = OPER.LEG_OPER_CARR_KEY 
where DT.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE-10,'MM')
	and 1 = 1 
	and FLT.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_TYPE in ('A', 'E', 'P') 
	and FLT.LEG_AS_MKTG_OPER_CARR in ('AS', 'OO', 'QX') 
	and LEG.LEG_ALLOCATED_REVENUE_AMT ! = 0 
	and TKT.TKT_DESIGNATOR_CODE not Like 'AS$' 
	and (TKT.TKT_DESIGNATOR_CODE not Like 'E%' and TKT.TKT_DESIGNATOR_CODE not Like '%P') 
	and TKT.TKT_DESIGNATOR_SUBTYPE_DESC ! = 'AS Award' 
	and TKT.TKT_DESIGNATOR_SUBTYPE_DESC ! = 'OAL Award' 
group by DT.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE, MKT.LEG_OD, FLT.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_NBR, CLS.PURCHASED_COS_CODE, OPER.LEG_OPER_CARR_AIRLINE_CODE

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((TTL_SPILL_REV / TTL_ALTEA_SPILL) > (EST_FARE * 0.8)) THEN (EST_FARE * 0.8) ELSE (TTL_SPILL_REV / TTL_ALTEA_SPILL) END)
CAST((CASE WHEN (CAST(CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE AS STRING) IN ('C', 'D', 'E', 'I', 'J', 'U')) THEN 'J' ELSE 'Y' END) AS STRING)
((((in0.FLT_NBR = in1.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_NBR) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.L2_COS))
((((in0.FLT_NBR = in1.LEG_AS_MKTG_FLT_NBR) AND (in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE)) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) AND (in0.CLASS_OF_SERVICE_CODE = in1.L3_COS))
(CASE WHEN ((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) THEN NULL ELSE in0.BASE_ORIG END)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.BASE_DPTR_DATE = in1.LEG_SC_DPTR_DATE) AND (in0.LEG_OD = in1.LEG_OD)) THEN NULL ELSE in0.BASE_DEST END)
